title: Panjumittai Lyrics Eetti Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Panjumittai mela
theeya patthavacha da.
Raatinatha pola
enna sutha vecha da.

Mela mela
Ava minnalathaan pole pole
Keezhe Keezhe
Ena konnuputtaale
Kaiyila siriga kattitittale
Paravayai aaneney

Hey dhadhi figure-a thanga silaya
Oththu varumaada
Ava sakka figure-a sema colour-a
Solli thola da

Panjumittai mela
theeya patthavacha da
Raatinatha pola
enna sutha vecha da

Mayila kuiyila theriyaadhu
Mani kural enna vaattudhada.

Kolluraan kolluraan
Thatthuvam solluraan
Aiyyyo thaangala da
Ivan overa pesuraan
Ketkuren kaadhula
Rattham oothudhada

Iravu pagalu paakaama
Peiya pola aattudhada.
Thanjai kobura nizhalaa
Nilavuku chitthappan magala

Hey dhadhi figure-a thanga silaya
Oththu varumaada
Ava sakka figure-a sema colour-a
Solli thola da

Thaerazhagaal varukindra
theruvai arivaano.
Kaarmugilaal tharugindra
Amudham kudipaano.
Koorvizhiyaal oru naal ivan
kuththi sarivaano.

oosi kanavu varumpodhu
Oru nodi kooda thoongalaye.

Parotta thinnutu korattai vittiye
Poi ku oru alavillaya.
Unaku kosu kadi thaangala
Neeyum thoongala
Alli vidura da.

Nirutham thaandi thoongiputten
Bus la whistle-u ketkalayae.
Olayila kodhikudhu manamae
Anaithida vaangala sanamae
Mazha penchaalum veyil adichaalum
Erumai pol aanen.

Hey dhadhi figure-a thanga silaya
Oththu varumaada
Ava sakka figure-a sema colour-a
Solli thola da

Panjumittai mela
theeya patthavacha da.
Raatinatha pola
enna sutha vecha da.

Mela mela
Ava minnalathaan pole pole
Keezhe Keezhe
Ena konnuputtaale
Kaiyila siriga katti vittale
Paravayai aaneney.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Panjumittai?

Panjumittai expresses themes of joy and celebration, highlighting the carefree spirit of youth.

What is the context of this song in the movie Eetti?

The song is featured in a lively scene that showcases the protagonist's carefree attitude and zest for life.

Who is the singer of Panjumittai?

The song is sung by Hariharasudhan, known for his energetic performances.

Who composed the music for Eetti?

The music for Eetti was composed by GV PrakashKumar, who is renowned for his catchy tunes.

When was Panjumittai released?

Panjumittai was released on September 26, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Panjumittai from the movie Eetti is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the joy of celebration. It features vibrant lyrics that evoke a sense of carefree happiness, making it perfect for festive occasions. The energetic performance by Hariharasudhan, combined with GV PrakashKumar's catchy composition, creates an infectious vibe that resonates with listeners. This song not only enhances the movie's narrative but also stands out as a favorite for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Panjumittai from Eetti is a vibrant celebration of life, brought to life by the energetic vocals of Hariharasudhan and the catchy composition of GV PrakashKumar. This song perfectly captures the essence of joy and festivity, making it an instant favorite for party playlists. Dive into the rhythmic beats and lively lyrics that will keep you dancing all night long!
stanzaMeanings: The fire is burning on the golden light. Just like the night, what have you hidden?
Up and down, she shines like lightning. Below, below, when she smiles, she ties up the joy in her hands.
Hey, with that figure, will she come? Her figure is amazing, tell me the color.
The fire is burning on the golden light. Just like the night, what have you hidden?
The peacock and the cuckoo don't know. What does the voice of the bell say?
He is a killer, he speaks philosophy. Oh no, he talks too much. I hear blood flowing in my ears.
Without seeing day or night, it dances like a child. In Thanjai, the shadow of the moon is like a bride.
The river gives, the waves give, in the sky.
Hey, with that figure, will she come? Her figure is amazing, tell me the color.
Do you know the street where the beautiful ones come? Will they drink the nectar that comes from the dark clouds? One day, will he become wise with his words?
When the dream of the eye comes, you can't sleep even for a moment.
After eating parotta, there's no limit to the fun. You can't bear the pain, and you won't sleep either.
I slept through the stop, did you hear the bus whistle? My heart is burning with anger. Whether it rains or shines, I am like a bull.
Hey, with that figure, will she come? Her figure is amazing, tell me the color.
The fire is burning on the golden light. Just like the night, what have you hidden?
Up and down, she shines like lightning. Below, below, when she smiles, she ties up the joy in her hands.
